TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Andray_Blatche, title = Andray_Blatche, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Andray_Blatche} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1986, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 8, Andray Blatche, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Andray Blatche mqwas biru sa Henninger pqwsan biru seneng. qnxan nya Angela Oliver hiya' ga, yaya' ni Andray Blatche. mintzyuwaw nya Andray Blatche hiya ga senmong pgnaw' mari' NBA. maki sa kawas 2005, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

kawas tay 1986, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 8, Andray Blatche, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Andray Blatche mqwas biru sa Henninger pqwsan biru seneng. qnxan nya Angela Oliver hiya' ga, yaya' ni Andray Blatche. mintzyuwaw nya Andray Blatche hiya ga senmong pgnaw' mari' NBA. maki sa kawas 2005, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, an*raj ő≤lat ¶~ ®ńße, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. pinqő≤aqan nja an*raj ő≤lat ¶~ ®ńße mqwas~…ē ő≤iru s~…ēa ńßenniŇčer pqws~…ēan ő≤iru s~…ēeneŇč. qnxan nja aŇčela oli*er ńßija Ē …£a, jaja Ē ni an*raj ő≤lat ¶~ ®ńße. mintzjuwaw nja an*raj ő≤lat ¶~ ®ńße ńßija …£a s~…ēenmoŇč p…£naw Ē mari Ē nő≤a. maki s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, t ĒariŇč mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na nő≤a. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč mas~…ēuq ms~…ēpuŇč mari s~…ēa ps~…ēpŇčan mari na maj ¶~ ®ju…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč l…£a ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
